sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 146 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 19.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel, under instructions, does not press this reference application, which is hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
